title: Automations - Always-On Agents Framework
description: Cursor launched Automations, a major new feature for building always-on agents that run based on triggers and schedules. Agents can be triggered by events from Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, and webhooks, with access to MCPs and memory tools for learning from past runs.

community_feedback.quote: Cursor now has 2x more agent users than Tab users - a massive shift toward agentic AI coding workflows

title: New Plugins on Cursor Marketplace
description: Added more than 30 new plugins from partners including Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Glean, Hugging Face, monday.com, and PlanetScale. Plugins contain MCPs that cloud agents can use when triggered manually or through automations.

title: Cursor in JetBrains IDEs
description: Cursor is now available in IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, and other JetBrains IDEs through the Agent Client Protocol (ACP), allowing developers to use frontier models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Cursor for agent-driven development.

title: GPT-5.4 Generally Available
description: GPT-5.4 is now generally available in GitHub Copilot for Pro, Pro+, Business, and Enterprise users. Early testing shows GPT-5.4 consistently hits new rates of success in agentic software development.

community_feedback.quote: GPT-5.4 is now generally available and rolling out in GitHub Copilot. Early testing shows it consistently hits high rates of success
is anyone else feeling like GPT 5.4 knows nothing about user experience?
is GPT-5.4 telling too many jokes?

title: Major Agentic Capabilities Improvements in JetBrains IDEs
description: GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs (v1.6.1) received significant updates including enhanced core agentic capabilities, custom agent features, and quality-of-life improvements.

title: Visual Studio Code v1.110 February Release
description: GitHub Copilot released enhanced agent capabilities for longer-running and complex tasks, improved control over agent workflows, and security updates in version 1.110.1 addressing issues in core and the GitHub Copilot Chat extension.

community_feedback.quote: Since we're talking about GitHub Copilot I'll lodge my biggest complaint about it here! The context window is stuck at 128k for all models
The Visual Studio Code February 2026 release makes agents practical for longer-running and more complex tasks

title: Version 0.114.0 - Experimental Code Mode
description: Codex CLI 0.114.0 released with an experimental code mode for more isolated coding workflows and an experimental hooks engine with SessionStart and Stop functionality.

title: Version 0.110.0 - Plugin System
description: Codex CLI 0.110.0 introduced a plugin system to load skills and MCP entries, along with improvements to the multi-agent Terminal User Interface (TUI).

title: v0.32.0 - Generalist Agent & Model Steering
description: Gemini CLI v0.32.0 released with the generalist agent now enabled to improve task delegation and routing, and new model steering capabilities within workspace environments. Patch release v0.32.1 followed with cherry-picked fixes.

title: Install Devin as an App (PWA)
description: Devin can now be installed as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on both desktop and mobile devices. Users can install by opening app.devin.ai in Chrome or Edge and clicking the install icon in the address bar. Release includes minor bug fixes, performance improvements, and visual polish.

community_feedback.quote: Where did Devin go? What does it say about the future of AI dev tools?
